content: أنا جَت لِي دَعوَة لِحَفلَة الأُوبرا الأُسبوع الَّذي فات
translations: eng:I received an invitation for the opera party last week

transcriptions.arabizi: 'ana gat|l|i daAwa li|haflit il'uoobrail'usbwaA il-li faet
